name: Metronidazole
description: Antibiyootiga Nitroimidazole oo leh caymis anaerobic iyo protozoal aad u fiican. Waxa lama huraan u ah dhexgalka caloosha iyo dhaawaca mindhicirka si loo daboolo flora mindhicirka anaerobic. Badanaa waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu daro ciprofloxacin.
indications: Dhaawaca caloosha iyo mindhicirka oo gala
dose: 500 mg IV q6-8h. PO: 500 mg q8h (haddii afka loo dulqaadan karo).
contraindications: Saddexda bilood ee ugu horreeya uurka (qaraabo)
metronidazole la yaqaan ama xasaasiyadda nitroimidazole
warnings: Dareen-celinta Disulfiram-u-eg ee khamriga -- ha cabbin aalkolo inta lagu jiro daawaynta iyo 48 saacadood ka dib.
Waxa laga yaabaa inay keento neuropathy durugsan iyadoo la isticmaalayo wakhti dheer.
Ka fogow saddexda bilood ee hore haddii ay suurtagal tahay.

pediatric.note: Badbaadada carruurta waaweyn. Ka fogow ilmaha dhasha.

obstetric.note: Ka fogow saddexda bilood ee hore haddii ay suurtagal tahay. Isticmaal saddex-biloodlaha labaad/saddexaad marka caafimaad ahaan loo baahdo -- faa'iidada badiyaa way ka miisaan badan tahay khatarta caabuqyada anaerobic ee halista ah.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
